feedback.text: Hello European Commission, can you help with my lost The Crew game, or all those games witch where lost to time? Stop Destroying Videogames initiative already reached 1.4 Million signatures. I'm as a customer believe that i have a protection from publishers which try to destroy my video games library. I loved The Crew i paid for it and now i can't play it, i lost product and money. Do i have digital rights as EU citizen?
